posts.author: IronWolve
posts.title: Meanwhile in oregon

twitter.content:
Oregon passes a new water law.

Starting Jan 1, 2026, a kayak, paddleboard — even an inner tube — is LEGALLY a boat.

No permit? That’s a $115 FINE just for being in the river.

This isn’t about public safety. It’s about enforcing compliance.
